Run all tests, update STATE.md and ROADMAP.md

blockers.workaround: Use pip install or switch to Debian python3-semver package

decisions.decision: Use pydantic v2 model_validator for PromptVersion validation
decisions.rationale: Follows existing Pydantic patterns in codebase
Keeps prompts close to the services that use them

next_action: Execute plan 09-02: Create PromptResolver class (backend/app/services/prompt_resolver.py) with semver matching, Jinja2 rendering, git tag helpers, and dual fallback to hardcoded constants. Then create 11 resolver tests.

The test_prompt_resolver.py file already has 7 tests from plan 01; plan 09-02 appends 11 more tests to the same file. Remember to suppress pydantic protected_namespaces warnings by adding model_config to PromptVersion if desired.
